title: Admin Dashboards for Crypto Digital Stores: Everything You Need to Get Started for Digital Creators
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, stuck with a PayPal account blocked due to 'unusual activity.' The same goes for your friends in Ghana, Kenya, and other restricted countries. They all want to sell ebooks, courses, and software, but can't collect payments through conventional platforms. It's time to take matters into your own hands and build a digital store that accepts crypto payments, free from the shackles of geographic restrictions and banking limitations.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

Conventional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe are notoriously restrictive, flagging legitimate transactions and freezing accounts without warning. But with a custom-built digital store, you're not beholden to these gatekeepers. With NOWPayments as your payment processor, you can accept 300+ coins, no KYC required, and no buyer account needed. It's a game-changer for creators who've been stuck in a payments limbo.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, you'll need a few essential tools: the Core Shop Engine, a backend platform that automates delivery and payment verification, and the Admin Dashboard, which gives you real-time transaction logs and order management. You'll also need the Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration that lets buyers pay in their preferred crypto, with live price feeds and multi-chain QR codes. And don't forget to sign up for the Admin Dashboard, which costs $29.99.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Setting up your payment and delivery pipeline is a breeze with the Core Shop Engine. Simply integrate it with your desired payment processor, in this case NOWPayments, and configure the automated delivery settings. This ensures that every sale is verified and delivered instantly, without the need for manual intervention. The result is a seamless customer experience that builds trust and loyalty.
A digital store that accepts crypto payments is the key to unlocking new revenue streams.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

To go live, simply deploy your digital store, add your products, and configure the payment settings. With the Web3 Wallet Connect, buyers can pay in their preferred crypto, and you'll receive instant notifications of every sale. To make your first sale, follow these simple steps: add a product to your store, create a payment link with NOWPayments, and share it with your audience. The result is a sale that's verified, delivered, and tracked in real-time.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once your digital store is up and running, it's time to scale. This means optimizing your payment and delivery pipeline for maximum throughput, while minimizing costs and friction. With the Admin Dashboard, you can monitor your sales, track your expenses, and make data-driven decisions to grow your business. By scaling your digital store, you can reach a wider audience, increase revenue, and build a loyal customer base.
